description.default: Optional. After processing, QFU tries to move the email to this folder. Set in the QFU Setup app after install (default: QFU Reports). Set to disabled to skip auto-move and rely on Outlook rules.

label.description: Optional. After processing, QFU tries to move the email to this folder. Set in the QFU Setup app after install (default: QFU Reports). Set to disabled to skip auto-move and rely on Outlook rules.
